description: Post-merge housekeeping after PR #313 (feat: local filesystem repo references) shipped in release 0.36.0. Archive two stale-completed plans (ls-exclude-bug, github-action-impl-plan), drop an orphan task stash whose target is already complete, delete one untracked build artefact, and reset current-task.json to point at the next real plan (or null). See the plan file for full task decomposition.
session_startup: Read context/cleanup-post-local-fs-repos.json for the full task list
Run git status to confirm the branch is chore/context-cleanup-20260415-0345 with a clean working tree (besides the untracked librust_out.rlib that task `remove-stray-artifacts` deletes)
Run git log --oneline -3 — top commit should be the one that introduced this plan file and task pointer
Find the first task in the plan where status=pending and blocked_by=null; execute in priority order
After executing `reset-current-task`, confirm with the user which next plan (init-apply-bug-plan or performance-review or null) current-task.json should point at — do not choose unilaterally
